basic_info.title: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night
basic_info.review: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night is widely considered one of the greatest games ever made, pioneering the metroidvania genre with its expansive castle exploration, deep RPG mechanics, and iconic soundtrack by Michiru Yamane.

alternative_names: Akumajō Dracula X: Nocturne in the Moonlight (悪魔城ドラキュラX 月夜の夜想曲 - Japanese)

play_today.details: The most accessible modern version with original voice acting intact. Includes both SotN and Rondo of Blood in one package.

recommended_patches.name: Original Voice Acting
recommended_patches.description: Preserves the iconic PS1 voice lines including 'WHAT IS A MAN?!'

play_today.details: PC emulation offers the most flexibility with save states, speed control, and modding support. Best experience with PCSX2 or similar PS1 emulators.

recommended_patches.name: SotN Reborn Mod
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive visual overhaul improving textures and models while preserving original art style

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Patch
recommended_patches.description: Unlocks frame rate for smoother gameplay on modern systems

recommended_patches.name: Control Enhancement Mod
recommended_patches.description: Improves input responsiveness and adds controller customization

play_today.details: Official mobile ports with touch controls. Convenient for portable play but uses newer voice dub that lacks original PS1 charm.

description.synopsis: Alucard, the son of Dracula, must explore his father's resurrected castle to stop a conspiracy that threatens to plunge the world into eternal darkness.
key_features: Deep RPG system with equipment and leveling
Multiple endings based on player choices
description.long_description: Castlevania: Symphony of the Night, released for PlayStation in March 1997 (Japan) and October 1997 (North America), is a landmark action-RPG that revolutionized the genre. Developed by Konami's Team Toei, it was the first Castlevania game to feature Metroid-style exploration with interconnected areas, backtracking, and ability-gated progression. Players control Alucard, Dracula's son, as he explores his father's resurrected castle filled with hundreds of enemies, bosses, secrets, and power-ups. The game features a deep RPG system where players can collect weapons, armor, spells, and items to customize their character. Its iconic soundtrack by Michiru Yamane remains one of gaming's most beloved compositions. While the PSP port (2007) added new voice acting, it lost some original charm. The mobile ports (2020) use the newer dub entirely. The PS1 version with original voices is universally considered the definitive experience.
legacy_and_impact: Defined and popularized the metroidvania genre
Set new standards for exploration-based game design
Michiru Yamane's soundtrack became legendary in gaming history
Influenced countless modern indie developers (Bloodstained, Hollow Knight, etc.)
Continues to receive community mods and patches decades after release
